---
description: LOOP with keyword clause symbols breaks at margin 20
column: 0
right-margin: [nil, 20]
---
(loop :for item :in items :when (valid-item-p item) :collect (transform-item item))
---
(loop :for item :in items
      :when (valid-item-p item)
      :collect (transform-item item))
---
(loop :for item :in items
      :when (valid-item-p
             item)
      :collect (transform-item
                item))
---
